definition: Tree-dominated land cover including natural and managed forest
monitoring_note: Class may hide degradation canopy thinning harvest cycles or recovery stage

definition: Land used or visibly managed for crop production
monitoring_note: Broad class may hide intensification irrigation crop rotation or soil exposure

definition: Hydrologically influenced land with wetland vegetation or wet soil indicators
monitoring_note: Condition change may occur before mapped wetland loss

definition: Built-up impervious or settlement-associated land cover
monitoring_note: Incremental impervious expansion may require fractional or high-resolution methods

definition: Herbaceous land cover including natural or managed grassland
monitoring_note: Condition and grazing pressure may not appear as class change

definition: Grazed or semi-natural land systems with variable vegetation cover
monitoring_note: Degradation may appear as productivity decline or soil exposure rather than class conversion
Seasonality drought flooding and reservoir management affect interpretation

definition: Low vegetation cover or exposed substrate
monitoring_note: Can indicate natural substrate construction disturbance mining drought or degradation

definition: Area under ecological restoration or recovery management
monitoring_note: Recovery requires trajectory validation not only class assignment
